title: Seagate (STX) Further Slashes Workforce to Boost Cost Savings
text: Seagate (STX) expects to generate annualized savings from this expanded restructuring plan in the range of $40-$45 million, beginning from the fourth quarter of fiscal 2023.

title: Seagate to increase the number of employees it lays off by 480
text: Seagate Technology Holdings PLC STX disclosed Wednesday that it is increasing the number of employees being laid off by 480, or 1% of its workforce. The maker of data-storage technologies had said in October that it planned to cut about 3,000 jobs, or 8% of its staff.

title: Is Seagate Stock A Better Pick Over Its Industry Peer?
text: Investors have assigned a higher multiple to STX stock due to its superior profitability and better financial position, as discussed below If we look at stock returns, both have seen significant cuts of about 30% in the last twelve months, faring worse than the broader S&P 500 index, down 12%.

title: 5 Tech Stocks With Bank-Like Dividend Yields
text: With the Federal Reserve vowing higher interest rates for longer, the 10-year Treasury Note yield entered March like a lion roaring above 4% for the first time since November 2022. After finishing last week at 3.4%, it appears to be heading out like a lamb.

title: Jaylen Clark of the UCLA Men's Basketball Team Scores with Newegg, MSI and Seagate Technology
text: CITY OF INDUSTRY, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $NEGG #basketball--Newegg Commerce, Inc. (NASDAQ: NEGG) in cooperation with MSI Computer Corp. and Seagate Technology (NASDAQ: STX) today announced the launch of a basketball-themed marketing campaign featuring Jaylen Clark, a top college basketball player for the UCLA men's basketball team. The three companies are launching an endorsement marketing campaign as an NIL partnership with Clark. A 6-foot, 5-inch junior guard from Riverside, Calif., Clark has averaged 13.
